prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约703→662→624→887→570名，2024年出现明显后移（887名），2025年大幅回升至570名，近5年波动较大，2025年基准约570名；本省物理类计划2021年93人→2022年96人→2023年100人→2024年103人→2025年80人（明显缩减）→2026年92人，较2025年扩招12人（+15%），扩招使竞争略有缓解但考生规模大幅增长抵消此效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜第5名（2022–2026年稳定），全国顶尖综合类大学；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及师德师风、学校管理），2025年偏正面（科研成果）；抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高涨；拥有中国语言文学A+、新闻传播学A+、哲学A+、政治学A+、数学A+、物理学A+、生物学A+、理论经济学A+、马克思主义理论A+、公共卫生与预防医学A+等大量A+学科，学科实力顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工科专业社会热度高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生约37.96万人，较2025年26.06万人大幅增长约45.7%，竞争显著加剧；复旦大学位于上海，与江苏地缘相近，跨省报考热度高；该校在江苏招生占比约6%–7%，属重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次570名、2026年扩招12人（+15%）、本省物理类考生大幅增长约45.7%以及抖音高热关注度，扩招缓解效应被考生激增大幅抵消，声誉偏负面亦对报考心理有轻微抑制；预测最低位次约636名，区间564–708名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 703 → 662 → 624 → 887 → 570. In 2024, there was a noticeable decline (887th), but in 2025, it rebounded significantly to 570th. Over the past five years, fluctuations have been large, with a baseline around 570th in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 93 in 2021 → 96 in 2022 → 100 in 2023 → 103 in 2024 → 80 in 2025 (significant reduction) → 92 in 2026, an increase of 12 students (+15%) compared to 2025. The expansion slightly eases competition, but the substantial growth in the number of examinees offsets this effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 5th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (stable from 2022 to 2026), a top-tier comprehensive university in China. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics and school management), while in 2025 it was somewhat positive (scientific research achievements). Douyin popularity ranking is 4th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, leading to sustained high attention for applications. It has numerous A+ disciplines including Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Philosophy, Political Science, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Theoretical Economics, Marxist Theory, and Public Health and Preventive Medicine, demonstrating top-tier academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is approximately 379,600, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 260,600 in 2025, intensifying competition. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, geographically close to Jiangsu, leading to high cross-province application enthusiasm. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 6%–7%, making it a key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 570th, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 12 students (+15%), the substantial increase of about 45.7% in provincial Physics Category examinees, and high Douyin attention, the easing effect of the expansion is largely offset by the surge in examinees. The somewhat negative reputation also slightly suppresses application psychology. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 636th, with a range of 564–708th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 564–708, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 550), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as the Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan and Integrated Circuit Leading Talent Class. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 700), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors and be cautious with stretch choices.
